thinks.think: Two men stand on a red track; the left wears a black tank top and plaid shorts, while the right wears a yellow tank top. They raise their hands, pointing index fingers upward. Pink Japanese text "やってみよー" appears overlaid across their torsos as they smile.

The two men raise their index fingers while pink Japanese text appears across the screen. Additional white text fades in below thanking a specific individual. The view then cuts to a solo shot of the man in the black tank top jogging forward, accompanied by new blue glowing text overlaid on his chest.

The man in the black tank top jogs forward alone on the grass beside the red track. Sequential blue glowing text overlays appear on his chest, changing from "普通に走っても" to "つまんないからさ". He raises his right index finger while smiling. Finally, large blue text reading "1周目から全力で走ってみる！" appears across his torso.

The man in the black tank top continues jogging on the grass. White text "あなたあたま大丈夫そ？？" appears above the blue overlay "1周目から全力で走ってみる！". In the final frame, the blue text changes to "どこまでもつか挑戦してみる" across his chest as he smiles.

The man in the black tank top jogs forward on the grass. The blue glowing text "どこまでもつか挑戦してみる" remains overlaid on his chest initially. In the final frame, the text disappears completely. He continues smiling and moving forward with arms slightly extended, with the red track and green field visible in the background.

The man in the black tank top jogs with small blue text appearing briefly. The scene cuts to him sitting cross-legged on the green track surface. He holds a small pink packet near his mouth, with a water bottle on the ground. White Japanese text appears at the top regarding caffeine intake before a race.

The man sits cross-legged on the green track surface holding a pink packet near his mouth, with a water bottle placed on the ground. A new line of white Japanese text appears below the existing header, providing a specific calculation guideline involving body weight.

The scene cuts to the man in the black tank top and plaid shorts standing on the red track with hands on hips. White text 'いつも以上に緊張中' is at the top. Pink text 'みつおかさん 緊張してますねー' appears at the bottom. He looks to his right.

The man in the black tank top walks on the red track with hands on hips. The pink text at the bottom disappears, while the white text at the top remains visible. He turns his head from looking right to facing forward towards the camera.

The scene cuts to a wide view of a grassy field with a red track in the background where runners are lined up. A white box with black text "スタート地点" appears at the top left, and large red text "ゴッ!" is displayed centrally over the field.

A wide shot displays a grassy field with a red track in the distance where a group of runners begins sprinting from left to right. The white text box reading "スタート地点" persists in the upper left corner, while the large red text "ゴッ!" disappears immediately.

A wide shot captures a green field with a red track in the background where a group of runners continues sprinting from left to right. The white text box reading 'スタート地点' remains fixed in the upper left corner as the athletes progress further along the track.

The wide shot persists, showing the green field and red track as the group of runners advances further to the right. The white text box labeled 'スタート地点' stays in the top left corner while the camera pans slightly right to track the athletes' continued movement along the course.

The wide shot of the green field and red track continues as the runners advance further into the distance. The white text box in the top left corner updates to display "100~200m地点". The athletes remain visible on the track in the background, moving towards the right side of the frame.

The wide shot of the grassy field and red track persists with the text "100~200m地点" in the top left corner. Runners continue sprinting along the track towards the right side of the frame, passing white marker poles. A runner in dark clothing is visible moving rightward on the track.

A wide shot displays a green field and red track with the text "100~200m地点" in the top left corner. New pink text reading "200m 26秒通過" appears centrally on the screen. Runners continue sprinting rightward along the track in the background, passing white markers.

The top left text changes to "300~400m地点" as the central pink timing overlay disappears. The wide shot shows the green field and red track with runners sprinting in the distance from left to right, now passing a section lined with large trees in the background.

The wide shot of the green field and distant track persists with the white text box "300~400m地点" in the upper left corner. A new text overlay appears in the center of the screen displaying "400mは 55秒通過" in large, orange-gradient characters with a white outline.

The scene cuts to a view looking down the red track lanes with white lane markers. A white text box in the top left corner now reads "500~600m地点". Distant runners are visible on the track moving away. The previous orange split-time text is no longer on screen.

The view stays at the 500-600m point on the red track. Runners sprint closer to the camera. The lead runner wears a black tank top and plaid shorts. Behind him, a runner in white follows. A person in a bright yellow shirt stands on the track to the right.

The camera angle shifts to a rear view as runners move away down the red track. The individual in the black tank top and plaid shorts runs in the left lane, while another runner in a white shirt is visible in the right lane. White posts connected by a rope line the track's edge, and the text "500~600m地点" remains at the top.

The white text box "500~600m地点" stays at the top. On the red track, a runner in a bright yellow shirt runs away from the camera, following others further ahead. Large, gradient pink text reading "600m 1分24秒通過" appears in the center of the screen. White posts connected by ropes line the track's edge.

The central pink text vanishes and the top label updates to '700~800m地点'. The view cuts to a wide shot of a green field where distant runners sprint along the track from left to right in front of trees.

A wide shot displays a grassy field with large trees in the distance beneath the white top label '700~800m地点'. Large orange text reading '800m 1分57秒通過' appears in the center of the black upper section, marking the elapsed time for the distance while the background scene remains static.

The scene cuts to the finish line area labeled '1000mゴール地点' at the top. A red running track with white lane markers stretches into the distance on the left. A person in dark clothing stands on the adjacent green grass on the right, facing the track, while distant runners approach on the red surface.

A red running track with white lane lines is on the left, next to green grass on the right, beneath a top label reading '1000mゴール地点'. A runner in dark clothing jogs closer on the track, while a person in dark clothing stands on the grass to the right, facing the track as the runner approaches.

Beneath the text "1000mゴール地点", a runner in a black tank top and patterned shorts sprints forward on the red track. White posts with ropes line the lane, separating the track from the green grass on the right, while a building with a green roof stands in the background.

A runner in a black tank top and patterned shorts sprints on the red track, moving closer to the camera. White posts with ropes separate the track from the grass. Behind the runner, spectators sit on concrete steps near a building with a green roof. The overlay text '1000mゴール地点' stays fixed at the top.

The runner in a black tank top and patterned shorts crosses the finish line. Large pink text '1000m 2分33秒' overlays the screen. The runner decelerates and turns slightly away from the camera on the red track, while the '1000mゴール地点' label remains at the top against a background of trees and spectators.

The runner in the black tank top and patterned shorts slows down and bends forward, resting hands on knees in exhaustion on the red track. The pink text overlay "1000m 2分33秒" remains visible at the top center. In the background, a person in blue stands on the green field near the trees.
